bead.title: Restructure homepage IA around loop, helix proof, and adoption journeys
bead.description: Implement the fresh-eyes homepage IA: replace duplicate hero helix with a loop graphic, keep the double helix as the worked-example centerpiece, replace generic methodology cards with core artifact spine, platform paths, and public proof/foundations sections.
bead.acceptance: Homepage uses the double helix only for the worked-example graph. Hero visual is a distinct loop showing artifacts, alignment review, implementation plan, runtime execution, and evidence/drift. Homepage includes a short how-it-works sequence, prioritized core artifact spine, platform paths, and proof/foundations links. DDx is not visually dominant.
